home.featured_subtitle: A few of the projects I’ve built and am proud of.

about.title: Hi, I’m Ameer 👋
about.lead: I’m Ameer Alafash, a Front-end developer and web designer. I build fast, beautiful, and easy-to-use web experiences using Vue.js, Nuxt.js, React, and Next.js.
about.p1: I started my web journey years ago, and learned how to combine good design with clean code to build digital products that make a real difference. I believe a great interface starts with understanding the user and ends with an unforgettable experience.
about.p2: I’ve worked on diverse projects: travel platforms, management apps, recruitment platforms, medical and commercial sites. Every project taught me something new and added to my experience.
services.title: How can I help you?
services.subtitle: I offer end-to-end services from design to development to build your digital product.

services.items.title: UI/UX Design
services.items.desc: Designing attractive user interfaces and a distinctive user experience using Figma. From wireframes to a testable prototype.

services.items.title: Front-end Development
services.items.desc: Building fast, modern web interfaces with Vue.js, React, Nuxt, and Next.js with Tailwind CSS.

services.items.title: WordPress Development
services.items.desc: Building custom WordPress themes and plugins and professional WooCommerce stores.

services.items.title: Performance Optimization
services.items.desc: Reviewing and optimizing the performance of your current apps: Core Web Vitals, load and SEO improvements.

services.items.title: Tech Consulting
services.items.desc: Reviewing your code and project structure and giving recommendations to improve quality and performance.

services.items.title: Responsive Design
services.items.desc: Making sure your site works perfectly across all devices and screens.

services.cta_subtitle: Tell me about your project and we’ll discuss how I can help.
work.title: Projects I’ve worked on
work.subtitle: I design and build modern web interfaces and apps. Each project was a challenge that taught me something new.
work.cta_subtitle: I’m always open to new and exciting projects. Get in touch and let’s build something great.

projects.name: HalaTrips
projects.desc: A travel and trip-booking platform built with Next.js, with map integration and advanced search.
projects.overview: HalaTrips is a travel and trip-booking platform that helps users discover, plan, and book trips with confidence. I led the design and front-end build, focusing on a fast, map-driven search experience that feels effortless on mobile and desktop.

projects.name: Rakeez
projects.desc: A web app for managing tasks and notes with a smooth, simple user experience.
projects.overview: Rakeez (meaning "focus") is a calm app for managing tasks and notes. The goal was to remove friction — a clean interface, gentle interactions, and keyboard-friendly workflows that keep the user in flow.

projects.name: Moashr
projects.desc: An Arabic job platform connecting employers with job seekers.
projects.overview: Moashr is an Arabic-first job platform connecting employers with job seekers across the region. I built the front-end with Nuxt for SEO-friendly server rendering and a fast, accessible RTL experience.

projects.name: Swipyy
projects.desc: An interactive marketing tool that lets marketers build interactive content fast.
projects.overview: Swipyy is an interactive marketing tool that lets marketers build engaging content quickly through a drag-and-drop builder. I engineered the interaction layer for speed and a delightful, game-like editing feel.

projects.name: CV Builder
projects.desc: A professional CV builder with PDF export.
projects.overview: A professional CV builder that lets anyone create a clean, recruiter-ready resume and export it to PDF in one click. I focused on print-perfect CSS and a guided, step-by-step editing experience.

projects.name: Medical Glamor
projects.desc: A medical aesthetics clinic website with an appointment booking system and WooCommerce.
projects.overview: Medical Glamor is a medical aesthetics clinic website with a booking system and a WooCommerce store. I designed and built a trustworthy, elegant experience that balances clinical credibility with a premium feel.
